# Agni Boards

> Agni Boards are handmade acupressure nail boards crafted in Thailand, rooted in 5,000 years of ancient Indian practice. Used for deeper sleep, stress relief, and nervous system reset.

## Product

- **Name**: Agni Board (acupressure nail board)
- **Type**: Wellness / recovery tool
- **Material**: Solid wood base with reinforced carbon steel nails
- **Intensity levels**: 3 (suitable for beginners to advanced)
- **Price**: From 2,800 THB
- **Includes**: Free jute carry bag
- **Designs available**: 8
- **Made in**: Thailand, handcrafted

## How it works

Stand barefoot on the board for two minutes. The nail pressure stimulates reflex points on the sole of the foot, activating the nervous system and triggering a parasympathetic response. This results in reduced tension, better sleep, and a calmer state.

## Key benefits

- Deeper sleep — activates nervous system release before bed
- Tension relief — nail pressure reaches deep into the fascia
- Nervous system reset — initial intensity fades into sustained calm
- Back pain support — foot pressure points connect throughout the body
